when I enanle mix_chunked, I do a bench_serving test but I meet a mem_leak bug

sglang.title: [Bug fix] Fix severe memory waste issue with torch.empty pin_memory
sglang.author: sjtushenhai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When using pin_memory=True parameter in torch.empty(), it causes severe CPU memory waste. The solution is to allocate the buffer without pin_memory then manually pin the memory using cudaHostRegister afterwards.

vllm.title: [bugfix] Missing cached item in beam search
vllm.author: fake0fan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
#26195 mentions

I'm encountering the same issue, and in my use case, it is reproducible 100% of the time when use beam-search.

After a detailed analysis, I found that in serving_engine.py, beam_search() calls _prompt_to_llm_inputs, which triggers multimodal preprocessing to be cached. Late

vllm.title: [Bugfix] [Model] Missing MRoPE function definition from `KeyeForConditionalGeneration`
vllm.author: tjtanaa
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This is a bugfix for Kwai-Keye/Keye-VL-8B-Preview as an effort to complete the unit test for upcoming RFC ViT Attention Reorganization. The fix will be used as validation of RFC correctness.
Ever since the shift of get_mrope_input_positions role from the GPU runner into model definition file
